feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - tools
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.
feed.subtitle: Recent content in tools on
feed.author: errbuffoverfl
feed.rights: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

entry.title: Temporal
entry.summary: An open source programming model that can be used to provide in depth tracing using the concept of “business logic as code”.

entry.title: Distributed Press
entry.summary: An open source publishing tool for the World Wide Web and [[Distributed Web]]. It automates publishing to the world wide web, and seeds to IPFS and Holepunch.
